title: ulmus parvifolia var. cycloptera
intro: Ulmus parvifolia var. cycloptera, also known as the Chinese Elm, is a variety of the Chinese Elm tree native to East Asia. This deciduous tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ulmus parvifolia var. cycloptera include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tincture, and decoction, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
